name: default
description: Matches the built-in nbody-3d reset formulas, but with zero initial velocity for a true free-fall collapse.

name: binary-clouds
description: Two counter-rotating 16-body clouds for a more visibly 3D interactive demo.

name: dual_intersecting_rings
description: Two perpendicularly orbiting rings with varied masses. Heavier bodies lead the rings to create a whipping effect.

name: random_galaxy
description: A generated galaxy with a 1000-mass center and 31 orbiting stars, scaled for fixed-point integer integration.
